Journal.Title: Scandinavian journal of medicine & science in sports

Article.ArticleTitle: Partial range of motion and muscle hypertrophy: not all ROMs lead to Rome.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Metabolism, Nutrition and Exercise Laboratory, Physical Education and Sport Center, Londrina State University, Londrina, Brazil.

Son J, Indresano A, Sheppard K, Ward SR, Lieber RL. Intraoperative and biomechanical studies of human vastus lateralis and vastus medialis sarcomere length operating range. J Biomech. 2018;67:91-97.

Newmire DE, Willoughby DS. Partial compared with full range of motion resistance training for muscle hypertrophy: a brief review and an identification of potential mechanisms. J Strength Cond Res. 2018;32(9):2652-2664.
